title: Here's why the Tilray Brands stock may surge soon despite major risks
text: Tilray Brands stock may surge soon despite major risks facing the company. The company's record international cannabis revenue growth, particularly in Germany, and the federal rescheduling of cannabis present significant tailwinds. However, risks remain including competitive pressures in Canadian cannabis market, regulatory uncertainties, and the fact that rescheduling does not equate to full legalization. Investors should monitor management's execution on cost reduction initiatives and international expansion strategy.
